questions.prompt: How did the boy ____ friends with the man in the second poem? (提示: 成为)
questions.context_sentence: How did the boy become friends with the man in the second poem?
questions.hint: be (是) + come (来) = 随时间到来，最终变成了某种状态。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 那个男孩是如何和第二首诗中的男人成为朋友的？

questions.prompt: But then he ____ down. (提示: 减速)
questions.context_sentence: But then he slowed down.
questions.hint: slow是慢，down是向下(趋势)，合起来就是把速度降下来。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 但后来他慢了下来。

questions.prompt: I saw some rubbish on the way. I ____ it up. (提示: 捡起)
questions.context_sentence: I saw some rubbish on the way. I picked it up.
questions.hint: pick是挑选/采摘，up是向上，把东西往上采起就是捡起。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 我在路上看到了一些垃圾。我把它捡了起来。

questions.prompt: I can ____ more about old people. (提示: 关心)
questions.context_sentence: I can care more about old people.
questions.hint: care是照顾，about是关于，把心思放在关于某人的事上就是关心。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 我可以多关心老年人。

questions.prompt: We can ____ up a park. (提示: 清理)
questions.context_sentence: We can clean up a park.
questions.hint: clean是干净，up强调动作彻底，彻底弄干净就是大扫除。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 我们可以清理一个公园。

questions.prompt: Now, my family often ____ together. (提示: 自愿做某事)
questions.meaning: 自愿(做某事); 志愿者
questions.context_sentence: Now, my family often volunteer together.
questions.hint: 谐音：哇(vol)+轮(un)+替(teer) -> 哇，大家轮流替换去做志愿者。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 现在，我们一家人经常一起做志愿者工作。

questions.prompt: "Daming, you're the real ____!" said Lingling. (提示: 获胜者)
questions.context_sentence: "Daming, you're the real winner!" said Lingling.
questions.hint: win (赢) + ner (人) = 赢的人，即获胜者。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: “大明，你才是真正的赢家！”玲玲说。

questions.prompt: The four friends went to a ____. (提示: 小山)

questions.prompt: ____, I picked up rubbish in the playground. (提示: 昨天)
questions.meaning: 在昨天, 在昨日; 昨天
questions.context_sentence: Yesterday, I picked up rubbish in the playground.
questions.hint: yes (是) + ter + day (天) -> 昨天是已经发生的天。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 昨天，我在操场上捡了垃圾。

questions.prompt: Yesterday, I picked up rubbish in the ____. (提示: 操场)
questions.context_sentence: Yesterday, I picked up rubbish in the playground.
questions.hint: play (玩) + ground (地面) = 玩耍的地面，就是操场。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 昨天，我在操场上捡了垃圾。

questions.context_sentence: Yesterday, I picked up rubbish in the playground.

questions.prompt: Last Sunday, I went to a ____ and read books to old people. (提示: 护理院)
questions.context_sentence: Last Sunday, I went to a care home and read books to old people.
questions.hint: care (照顾) + home (家) = 专门用来照顾老人的家。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 上周日，我去了护理院，给老年人读书。

questions.context_sentence: Last Sunday, I went to a care home and read books to old people.

questions.cn: 上周日，我去了护理院，给老年人读书。

questions.prompt: What can you learn from the three ____? (提示: 诗)
questions.context_sentence: What can you learn from the three poems?
questions.hint: 谐音“破门”，破门而入只为了大声朗诵这首诗。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 你能从这三首诗中学到什么？

questions.context_sentence: What can you learn from the three poems?
questions.hint: 谐音“破门”，破门而入只为了大声朗诵这首诗。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 你能从这三首诗中学到什么？

questions.prompt: Small and ____, He's always by my side. (提示: 活泼的)
questions.context_sentence: Small and playful, He's always by my side.
questions.hint: play (玩耍) + ful (充满...的) = 充满玩耍欲望的，爱玩的。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 它小巧又爱玩，总是陪在我身边。

options: 在昨天, 在昨日; 昨天
questions.context_sentence: Small and playful, He's always by my side.

questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 它小巧又爱玩，总是陪在我身边。

questions.meaning: 一侧, 身边, 旁边
questions.context_sentence: He's always by my side.
questions.hint: 谐音“赛道”，在赛道旁边为选手加油。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 他总是在我身边。

questions.prompt: 一侧, 身边, 旁边

questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 他总是在我身边。

questions.prompt: He'll be ____'s eyes one day. (提示: 某人)
questions.context_sentence: He'll be someone's eyes one day.
questions.hint: some (一些) + one (人) = 某一个人。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 总有一天，他会成为某个人的眼睛。

questions.context_sentence: He owned a ukulele.
questions.hint: 完全音译词：尤-克-里-里。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 他有一把尤克里里琴。

questions.prompt: So I brought over my ____. (提示: 吉他)
questions.context_sentence: So I brought over my guitar.
questions.hint: 完全音译词：吉-他。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 所以我带来了我的吉他。

questions.context_sentence: At lunchtime, I saw The new kid.
questions.hint: lunch (午餐) + time (时间) = 吃午餐的时间。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 午餐时间，我看到了新来的孩子。

questions.prompt: But after I ate it, I felt ____. (提示: 吃饱的)
questions.context_sentence: But after I ate it, I felt full.
questions.hint: 谐音“腹”，腹部吃得满满的，饱了。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 但是吃完后，我感觉很饱。

questions.context_sentence: How did the boy become friends with the man in the second poem?
questions.hint: 谐音“赛肯的”，比赛中肯定的第二名。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 那个男孩是如何和第二首诗中的男人成为朋友的？

questions.prompt: Which poem do you like ____? Why? (提示: 最多地)
questions.context_sentence: Which poem do you like most? Why?
questions.hint: 谐音“魔兽”，全世界玩魔兽世界的人最多。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 你最喜欢哪首诗？为什么？

questions.context_sentence: Who's the hero in your heart?
questions.hint: he (他) + ro (肉) = 满身都是肌肉的他，是一个无敌英雄。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 谁是你心中的英雄？

questions.prompt: Who's the hero in your ____? (提示: 心)
questions.context_sentence: Who's the hero in your heart?
questions.hint: hear (听) + t (他) = 静静地聆听他内心的声音。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 谁是你心中的英雄？

questions.context_sentence: She sat on her own.
questions.hint: own是自己的，靠自己的力量/陪伴，引申为独自地。
questions.title: Vocab Master
questions.cn: 她独自坐着。
